class_hierarchy: VcsDriverInterface (interface) — defines: initialize(), getComposerInformation(), getRootIdentifier(), getBranches(), getTags(), getDist(), getSource(), getUrl(), hasComposerFile(), cleanup(), supports()
constructor_flow: VcsRepository::__construct(repoConfig, io, config, httpDownloader, dispatcher?, process?, drivers?, versionCache?)

Registers driver map: github=>GitHubDriver, gitlab=>GitLabDriver, bitbucket/git-bitbucket=>GitBitbucketDriver, forgejo=>ForgejoDriver, git=>GitDriver, hg=>HgDriver, perforce=>PerforceDriver, fossil=>FossilDriver, svn=>SvnDriver
Sets url, io, type (repoConfig['type'] ?? 'vcs'), config, repoConfig, versionCache, httpDownloader, processExecutor
interaction_flow: Caller → VcsRepository: initialize() [called lazily by ArrayRepository]
getDriver: if type matches key in drivers map → instantiate specific driver class directly
getDriver: else iterate drivers → call Driver::supports(io, config, url, deep=false) — first pass shallow check
getDriver: else iterate drivers → call Driver::supports(io, config, url, deep=true) — second pass deep check
getDriver: new DriverClass(repoConfig, io, config, httpDownloader, processExecutor)
loop tags: preProcess(driver, data, identifier) → driver->getDist(identifier), driver->getSource(identifier)
reorder: rootIdentifier branch moved to front

GitHubDriver::initialize(): Regex-parse URL to extract owner, repository, originUrl
If use-github-api=false or no-api=true → setupGitDriver(url) and return (fallback to GitDriver)
Otherwise → fetchRootIdentifier() → HTTP GET api.github.com/repos/{owner}/{repo} → sets repoData, rootIdentifier
GitHubDriver::supports(): Check originUrl in config github-domains list
GitBitbucketDriver::initialize(): Regex-parse HTTPS bitbucket.org URL to extract owner, repository
NOTE: does NOT fetch API data on init — deferred to getRootIdentifier()/getTags()/getBranches() via getRepoData()
GitBitbucketDriver::getRootIdentifier(): If rootIdentifier not cached → call getRepoData()
getRepoData() → HTTP GET api.bitbucket.org/2.0/repositories/{owner}/{repo} → sets branchesUrl, tagsUrl, vcsType, cloneHttpsUrl
If vcsType != 'git' → throw RuntimeException (hg no longer supported)

key_relationships: VcsRepository depends_on VcsDriverInterface (via driver map, instantiation, and calls)
VcsRepository depends_on ArrayLoader / ValidatingArrayLoader (load package data)
GitHubDriver depends_on GitHub util (OAuth handling), Cache (HTTP response caching)
GitBitbucketDriver depends_on Bitbucket util (OAuth), Cache, optional fallback VcsDriver
GitHubDriver has optional gitDriver fallback (delegates to GitDriver when no-api=true)
GitBitbucketDriver has optional fallbackDriver (set on auth failure)
alt_flows: ALT: type key matches drivers map → skip supports() detection, instantiate directly
ALT: GitHubDriver use-github-api=false → delegates all calls to internal GitDriver instance
ALT: GitBitbucketDriver auth failure → fallbackDriver set, all calls proxied to fallback
ALT: cachedPackage found → addPackage(cached), skip getComposerInformation()
ALT: cachedPackage===false (cached empty) → add to emptyReferences, skip
ALT: TransportException 401/403/429/5xx → rethrown, others logged and skipped
ALT: no packages found after all tags+branches → throw InvalidRepositoryException
important_notes: VcsRepository.getDriver() does two passes of supports(): first shallow (url regex only), then deep (may do network calls). initialize() is protected and called lazily. preProcess() ensures name consistency across all tags/branches using root identifier's packageName. Tags strip 'release-' prefix. Branch versions are always 'dev-{branch}' or use x-wildcard form. driver.cleanup() called at end of initialize().
